{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323134846A439C20F7B51BA21D150\"}"},"total":460},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7100880515326755588","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"已经追到65章了，文笔没的说，稳得一批，剧情安排也巧妙，尤其是鉴宝捡漏方面，绝对能看出作者的知识储备，破局解局一个字爽，接下来我估计杨奋斗该跟女主慕晓频繁接触了，可能要寻宝了，不知道又有啥事情要发生了，作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1653302703,"group_id":"7088314967908158501","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1429813846349683"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7088314967908158501","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.8574716e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读39小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":80969,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":139543,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":78},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7099869380368384772","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了20章，忍不住想说点，一看文笔就知道作者不是新手，剧情紧凑，娓娓道来，一切剧情都在围绕杨奋斗展开，看起来有点慢热，但是剧情走势很清晰，而且爽点都在鉴宝之中，解局破局很过瘾，总体说这是一本好书，值得一读。继续读后面的，再写评论。加油作者。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1653067686,"group_id":"7088314967908158501","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"落笔成章，字成云烟，文字在梦里飞翔，故事在纸上跳跃。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3gsajEPeS1oJrVQcabRBENV1rGLFyyitHWu7X/MNnA8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1429813846349683","user_name":"半山炊烟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1429813846349683","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,
